1_environment_status.korean_ime: ko-KR installed, clipboard paste required for Korean input
1_environment_status.etap_proxy: Active — APF module intercepts AI service traffic
1_environment_status.network: Etap MITM bridge operational, HTTPS interception via VT module
1_environment_status.tools: Desktop Commander MCP + windows-mcp available, 60s hard timeout per command

tests_executed.notes: First visible error — Error 6002 with retry button
Removing [] changes parsing to silent failure
Mistral frontend swallows tRPC errors silently
Confirms array format reproducibility — identical to #322

2_test_summary.definitive_finding: ONLY array-format NDJSON [{}] + h2_mode=2 (keep-alive) produces visible Error 6002. All other approaches produce SILENT_RESET or SILENT_BLOCK.

3_inefficiencies_and_problems: DPI scaling (125%) causes coordinate miscalculations — physical vs logical pixel confusion required formula: logical = physical / 1.25
Responsive mode toggling: Clicking near DevTools device toolbar accidentally toggled Responsive mode (400x642), requiring F12 close/reopen cycle to fix
PowerShell nested invocation from PowerShell host fails — must use cmd shell for Desktop Commander
Korean path encoding: PowerShell -File with Korean paths fails from Desktop Commander — must cd first then use relative path
Chrome profile menu popup: Clicking near profile icon area opens unwanted menu
Desktop Commander 60s hard timeout: Cannot use Start-Sleep > 55s, limits polling granularity
Git push conflicts: Remote changes between commit and push require stash/pull/pop cycle
4_skill_improvement_suggestions: test-pc-worker: Add DPI-aware coordinate helper — auto-detect scaling factor and convert physical↔logical
test-pc-worker: Add Snapshot-first workflow as default — always use label-based clicking instead of raw coordinates
test-pc-worker: Add .ps1 script template with auto-incrementing namespace names (W_N, API_N) to avoid Add-Type conflicts
test-pc-worker: Add git conflict auto-resolution (stash/pull/pop) as standard push workflow
test-pc-worker: Add clipboard-paste-only mode for all Korean text input (never use SendKeys for Korean)
test-pc-worker: Add DevTools state tracking — remember if Responsive mode is on/off to avoid accidental toggles
Polling skill: Desktop Commander 60s timeout forces 55s ping loops — consider alternative wait mechanisms

easy.reason: Simple REST API, 403 + JSON renders in chat bubble. SOLVED (#310)
APF redirect works perfectly, visible Korean warning banner. SUCCESS (#316)

medium.reason: 403 visible in DevTools but not in UI. PARTIAL (#315)

hard.reason: tRPC + superjson + HTTP/2 + NDJSON streaming. Only array-format NDJSON triggers Error 6002 (not custom warning). Most complex protocol stack tested.

6_pending_requests.note: All requests up to #326 have corresponding result files. #327 is this report.

7_common_error_patterns.fix: Use unique -Name (W60, W61...) and -Namespace (API60, API61...) per script

7_common_error_patterns.frequency: Every PowerShell file execution via Desktop Commander
7_common_error_patterns.fix: cd to directory first, then use relative path with -File

7_common_error_patterns.frequency: 3-4 times per session when clicking near toolbar
7_common_error_patterns.fix: Use Snapshot labels for precise clicking; close/reopen DevTools with F12 if toggled

7_common_error_patterns.frequency: When dev PC pushes between our commit and push
7_common_error_patterns.fix: git stash && git pull --rebase origin main && git stash pop && git push

7_common_error_patterns.frequency: Session start or after long idle
7_common_error_patterns.fix: start chrome from cmd, or click taskbar icon
Clipboard.SetText() + SendKeys('^v') — only method for React inputs
